rulings.Case Title: OLGA BALTODANO VS. ERNESTO ALONSO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ernesto Alonsos Furhter Responses To Form Interrogatory, Set One, Number 15.1; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record, Kurt Bridgman, In The Amount Of $1,173.05
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 22, 2018, line 1. PLAINTIFF OLGA BALTODANO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ernesto Alonsos Furhter Responses To Form Interrogatory, Set One, Number 15.1; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record, Kurt Bridgman, In The Amount Of $1,173.05 GRANTED. Defendant is hereby ordered to pay Plaintiff sanctions of $1,173.05. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RANDOLPH R. SCOTT ET AL VS. ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 22, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiffs fail to allege facts in support of punitive damages. The following paragraphs in Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint are stricken: Paragraphs 36 through 42; paragraphs 49 through 53; and paragraph 61. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FISHER DEVELOPMENT INC. VS. 2675 FOLSOM OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs First Cause Of Action For Foreclosure Of Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 22, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT 2675 FOLSOM OWNER, LP, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs First Cause Of Action For Foreclosure Of Mechanics Lien DENIED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts that it is entitled to a mechanic's lien. Whether Plaintiff furnished labor or materials that improved property is a question of fact not appropriate for Judgment on the Pleadings. Additionally, failure to record lis pendens does not preclude enforcement of mechanic's lien against Defendant because Defendant is not a subsequent purchaser. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC VS. CATHERINE HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved From Deemed Admisions (Ccp 2033.300 (A))
